message:
Running command: # The GRT completed successfully. We need to manually finish step 32 by
# writing ODB/DEF/netlist views WITHOUT running check_antennas.
# Read the _env.tcl to get all variables needed.

STEP32="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v4/32-openroad-globalrouting"
grep "STEP_DIR\|SCRIPTS_DIR\|PDK_ROOT\|DESIGN_NAME" "$STEP32/_env.tcl" | head -10
